mapper.select: SELECT TEMPLATE_CODE, LABEL, DESCRIPTION, PURPOSE, TARGET_ENV, VM_PROFILE_CODE, TOTAL_USERS, DESIGN_PEAK_TPS, DEPLOYMENT_AP, MAX_THREADS, POOL_PER_VM, SORT_ORDER, ENABLED, SEED_PAYLOAD, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT, CAST(UPDATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS UPDATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_SCENARIO_TEMPLATE WHERE ENABLED = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, TEMPLATE_CODE

SELECT TEMPLATE_CODE, LABEL, DESCRIPTION, PURPOSE, TARGET_ENV, VM_PROFILE_CODE, TOTAL_USERS, DESIGN_PEAK_TPS, DEPLOYMENT_AP, MAX_THREADS, POOL_PER_VM, SORT_ORDER, ENABLED, SEED_PAYLOAD, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT, CAST(UPDATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS UPDATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_SCENARIO_TEMPLATE WHERE TEMPLATE_CODE = #{templateCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE CAP_NEW_SCENARIO_TEMPLATE SET LABEL = #{label}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PURPOSE = #{purpose}, TARGET_ENV = #{targetEnv}, VM_PROFILE_CODE = #{vmProfileCode}, TOTAL_USERS = #{totalUsers}, DESIGN_PEAK_TPS = #{designPeakTps}, DEPLOYMENT_AP = #{deploymentAp}, MAX_THREADS = #{maxThreads}, POOL_PER_VM = #{poolPerVm}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, ENABLED = #{enabled}, SEED_PAYLOAD = #{seedPayload}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE TEMPLATE_CODE = #{templateCode}
